source_pr.title: plan: covert max/min to Limit + Sort operators
source_pr.body:
For SQL like `select max(c) from t;`, we could optimize it to `select c from t order by c desc limit 1;`.
For SQL like `select min(c) from t;`, we could optimize it to `select c from t order by c limit 1;`.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR introduces a planner optimization (rewrite MAX/MIN aggregations into `TopN/Sort + Limit` style plans) and updates related plan/executor code and tests. The patch does not clearly show a targeted stabilization change for an intermittent/flaky failure, and the case evidence string is not a concrete flaky failure signature, so we conservatively classify it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: files: plan/aggregation_eliminate.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, executor/index_lookup_join.go, executor/join.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/resolve_indices.go, plan/topn_push_down.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go
